title: daemon store use_space_invite_code is non-atomic TOCTOU race
description: use_space_invite_code (store.rs lines 963-989) first checks invite expiry and use count in a SELECT, then separately calls upsert_space_member_with_role in a second transaction. Two concurrent callers with the same single-use invite code can both pass the expiry/count check before either increments the use count, allowing the invite to be redeemed more than the allowed number of times. Fix: wrap both the check and the upsert in a single BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction with re-validation inside.
